title: Good Medicine Magazine
description: Good Medicine is the Physicians Committee’s quarterly member magazine that provides campaign updates, breaking news on the health benefits of plant-based nutrition, and more.
description_en: Good Medicine is the Physicians Committee’s quarterly member magazine that provides campaign updates, breaking news on the health benefits of plant-based nutrition, and more.
paragraphs: Good Medicine is the Physicians Committee’s quarterly member magazine that provides campaign updates, breaking news on the health benefits of plant-based nutrition, and more.
A subscription to Good Medicine is included with a Physicians Committee membership.

Good Medicine is the Physicians Committee’s quarterly member magazine that provides campaign updates, breaking news on the health benefits of plant-based nutrition, the latest information on scientific advances that are improving human health by replacing animal tests and experiments, practice tips for physicians and health care professionals, infographics, and physician profiles.
paragraphs_en: Good Medicine is the Physicians Committee’s quarterly member magazine that provides campaign updates, breaking news on the health benefits of plant-based nutrition, and more.
A subscription to Good Medicine is included with a Physicians Committee membership.

Good Medicine is the Physicians Committee’s quarterly member magazine that provides campaign updates, breaking news on the health benefits of plant-based nutrition, the latest information on scientific advances that are improving human health by replacing animal tests and experiments, practice tips for physicians and health care professionals, infographics, and physician profiles.
